chat.welcome: Hi, I'm your HealthBridge assistant. I'll ask a few questions to understand what's going on.
chat.disclaimer: This is not a diagnosis, but I'll help guide your next steps.

questions.chief_complaint: What's your main symptom today? (e.g., headache, fever, cough, stomach pain)
questions.duration: How long has this been going on?
questions.severity: How severe is it right now?
questions.history: Do you have any chronic conditions or allergies?
questions.risk_factors: Recent travel, injuries, surgeries, or sick contacts?
questions.impact: How is this affecting your daily life?

followups.headache: Is the pain on one side, both sides, or all over?
followups.fever: Have you measured your temperature? If yes, what was the highest reading?
followups.cough: Is your cough dry or producing phlegm?
followups.abdominal: Where is the pain mostly located?

summary.title: Here’s a quick summary:
summary.noMatch: I couldn’t confidently map a specific category. If severe or worsening, seek care. Otherwise, consider a virtual consult.

scripture.comfort: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.
